top_signals.title: Taiwan was front and center during Trump's China trip — but absent from Xi’s meeting with Putin
top_signals.summary: The meetings between China's Xi Jinping and his U.S. and Russian counterparts came just days apart, but there was a stark contrast in tone and content.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK inflation rate eases to 2.8% in April, but slowdown is expected to be short-lived
top_signals.summary: Economists polled by Reuters had expected the inflation rate to drop back to 3%, cooling from 3.3% in March.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Scottish Startup Tripster Launches With Aim to Reinvent Accommodation Management Model
top_signals.summary: Dundee-founded startup launches fixed-fee, white-label accommodation management platform for hospitality operators White-label approach allows businesses to retain their own branding and guest experience while outsourcing backend operations Built for estates, boutique hotels, guest houses and portfolio operators managing multiple properties
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
